sentences.en: Saturday afternoon, Sophia decided it was time to switch our closets from summer clothes to cooler-weather clothes.
sentences.zh: 星期六下午，Sophia 決定是時候把衣櫃從夏天的衣服換成比較涼一點的衣服了。

sentences.en: My closet had way too many T-shirts in it, mostly in white, black, and one bright orange one I never actually wear.
sentences.zh: 我的衣櫃裡有太多件T恤了，大部分是白色、黑色，還有一件我根本不會穿的亮橘色。

sentences.en: Sophia pulled out a red jacket, a gray sweater, and a pair of blue jeans and said these would be enough for most cold days.
sentences.zh: Sophia 拿出一件紅色外套、一件灰色毛衣，還有一條藍色牛仔褲，說這些應付大部分寒冷的日子就夠了。

sentences.en: I also found a green skirt I forgot I owned, and a pink dress from last year that is now a little too short.
sentences.zh: 我還找到一件我忘記自己有的綠色裙子，還有去年那件粉紅色洋裝，現在已經有點太短了。

sentences.en: William's closet was a complete disaster, with shorts, pajamas, and one single shoe mixed together in no order at all.
sentences.zh: William 的衣櫃簡直是一場災難，短褲、睡衣，還有一隻不知道另一隻在哪的鞋子全都亂七八糟混在一起。

sentences.en: We finally found the missing shoe's matching pair under his bed, next to a yellow rain jacket he insisted he never owned.
sentences.zh: 我們終於在他床底下找到那隻不見鞋子的另一隻，旁邊還有一件他堅持自己從沒買過的黃色雨衣。

sentences.en: Sophia picked out a warm brown coat, a pair of black pants, and thick gloves for William's winter box.
sentences.zh: Sophia 幫 William 的冬季衣物箱挑了一件保暖的棕色外套、一條黑色長褲，還有一副厚手套。

sentences.en: William put the gloves on immediately and announced that his hands were now officially robot hands again.
sentences.zh: William 立刻把手套戴上，宣布他的手現在正式變回機器人的手了。

sentences.en: I told him gloves are for keeping warm, not for turning into a robot, but he was clearly not listening to me at all.
sentences.zh: 我跟他說手套是用來保暖的，不是用來變成機器人的，但他顯然完全沒在聽我說話。

sentences.en: We packed the summer T-shirts, shorts, and pajamas into a big box to store under the bed for a few months.
sentences.zh: 我們把夏天的T恤、短褲跟睡衣打包進一個大盒子，放到床底下收個幾個月。

sentences.en: Sophia kept one golden-colored scarf out of the storage box, saying it always brings good luck when the weather turns cold.
sentences.zh: Sophia 特地留下一條金黃色的圍巾沒收進箱子，說天氣一變冷它總能帶來好運。

sentences.en: I asked her why golden, and she said it reminds her of warm sunlight even on the grayest winter afternoon.
sentences.zh: 我問她為什麼是金黃色，她說這顏色會讓她想起溫暖的陽光，就算在最灰暗的冬天下午也一樣。

sentences.en: By the end of the afternoon, my closet had a clear system: dark colors for cold days, brighter colors for warmer ones.
sentences.zh: 整個下午結束時，我的衣櫃有了一套清楚的系統：冷天穿深色，暖一點的日子穿亮一點的顏色。

sentences.en: William's closet system, on the other hand, was simply "whatever color makes me look the most like a robot."
sentences.zh: 而 William 的衣櫃系統，另一方面，就只是「看哪個顏色讓我看起來最像機器人」而已。

sentences.en: Sophia laughed and said every family needs at least one member who refuses to follow any normal rules about clothes.
sentences.zh: Sophia 笑著說，每個家庭都需要至少一個成員完全不理會任何穿衣服的正常規則。

sentences.en: That night, I wore my new gray sweater to dinner, and even Perry seemed to approve, resting his head right on my sleeve.
sentences.zh: 那天晚上，我穿著新的灰色毛衣吃晚餐，就連 Perry 好像也很滿意，把頭靠在我袖子上。

quiz.question: What does William announce right after putting on his winter gloves?
options: That his hands are officially robot hands again.
That the gloves do not fit.

quiz.question: Why does Sophia keep the golden scarf out of the storage box?
options: It reminds her of warm sunlight and brings good luck.
It is the only scarf she owns.
It does not fit in the box.
